heading: Omitted
label: 395 to 405 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 395 to 405, relating to the Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of the admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 395, , , authorized a miners’ labor lien on output, and provided for its priority.act June 25, 1910, ch. 422, § 136 Stat. 848Section 396, , , required the filing of the claim of the lien, and prescribed the form of the claim.act June 25, 1910, ch. 422, § 236 Stat. 848Section 397, , , directed the recorder to record claims of lien.act June 25, 1910, ch. 422, § 336 Stat. 849Section 398, , , specified the duration of the lien.act June 25, 1910, ch. 422, § 436 Stat. 849Section 399, , , prescribed the procedure for foreclosure of the liens.act June 25, 1910, ch. 422, § 536 Stat. 849Section 400, , , authorized defects in lien notice or in proceedings to foreclose to be cured by amendment.act June 25, 1910, ch. 422, § 636 Stat. 849Section 401, , , prescribed certain procedures in proceedings to foreclose liens, and permitted intervention by adverse claimants.act June 25, 1910, ch. 422, § 736 Stat. 850Section 402, , , provided for joinder of plaintiffs, consolidation of actions, and waiver of lien.act June 25, 1910, ch. 422, § 836 Stat. 850Section 403, , , required judgment for claimants, and provided for its enforcement.act June 25, 1910, ch. 422, § 936 Stat. 850Section 404, , , permitted appeals from final judgments of justices of the peace in actions under sections 395 to 405 of this title.act June 25, 1910, ch. 422, § 1036 Stat. 851Section 405, , , prescribed the criminal liability for buying, removing, etc., minerals with notice of lien.act June 25, 1910, ch. 422, § 1136 Stat. 851
